## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 17, 2026 - Mar 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Robin med Z_, Mar 17, 2026, 2/5: "Overpriced. No way to share with partner without breaking the rules. app crashes. THERES NOT EVEN AN ACTUAL WAY TO INCREASE INTENSITY WITHIN THE PLAN WHEN ITS WAY TOO EASY."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      2 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Feb 22, 2026 - Apr 30, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Youri van Garrel_, Apr 30, 2026, 1/5: "i asked for " gym workouts ". now i get full body home workouts. the AI chat cant help, no assistance offered further. cant change any settings whatshowever. very annoying, got really frustrated within 20 minutes after paying a subscription. Body scan costs extra. 👎🏼"
            2. _Mickael Hubrecht_, Feb 22, 2026, 1/5: "to expensive.. local gyms are cheaper!"
